zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan de Swillington於1155年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾斯維林頓時，她的父親Hugh de Swillington30歲，母親Lady Hugh de Swillington25歲。她與William Walter de Calverley在英國越可爾斯維林頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan de Swillington于1155年出生在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾斯維林頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Swillington30岁，母亲Lady Hugh de Swillington25岁。她与William Walter de Calverley在英国越可爾斯維林頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swillington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Shilvington in Morpeth (Northumberland). The placename probably means something like ‘the farmstead of the people who live at the ledge’, from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
perhaps a habitational name from Shitlington (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Scyt(t)el + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan de Swillington was born in 1155, in Swillington, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Swillington, was 30 and her mother, Lady Hugh de Swillington, was 25. She married William Walter de Calverley in Swillington, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan de Swillington est née en 1155, à Swillington, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Swillington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Hugh de Swillington, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Walter de Calverley à Swillington, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Calverley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan de Swillington 1155 in Swillington, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Swillington 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Hugh de Swillington 25. Sie hat in Swillington, Yorkshire, England William Walter de Calverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Swillingtonが1155年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアスウィリントンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Swillingtonは30歳，母Lady Hugh de Swillingtonは25歳であった。イギリスヨークシュアイアスウィリントンでWilliam Walter de Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Swillington(이)가 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 스윌링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Swillington(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Hugh de Swillington(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 영국 요르크실르 스윌링턴에서 William Walter de Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan de Swillington родилась в 1155 г. в местности свиллингтон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Swillington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Hugh de Swillington, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Walter de Calverley в местности свиллингтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности калвирли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
